headline: Design Software Stocks Q4 Teardown: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) Vs The Rest
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the design software stocks, including Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) and its peers.
